17.note: And Jonah was in the belly of the fish three days and three nights — Jesus cites this as the sign of Jonah: the Son of Man will be three days and three nights in the heart of the earth; Jonah's entombment in the fish and his emergence is the type of Jesus's death and resurrection
Three days in the fish -- sign of Jonah for this generation
Sign of Jonah -- as Jonah was a sign to the Ninevites

5.note: The men of Nineveh repented at the preaching of Jonah, and behold something greater than Jonah is here — Jesus contrasts Nineveh's repentance at Jonah's preaching with the Jewish generation's refusal to repent at Jesus's preaching; Nineveh is a Gentile city that responded; this generation has responded to a greater preacher with less
Nineveh repented at Jonah's preaching -- greater than Jonah is here
